name: Garlic Lover's Creamy Cucumber Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine light mayonnaise (low fat) with minced garlic.
2. Add minced parsley and chives (or scallions).
3. Stir in plain non-fat yogurt.
4. Season with pepper to taste.
5. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
6. Chill the dressing before using.
Makes approximately 2 3/4 cups.
